title: Tetramerium ochoterenae
taxonomy: Tetramerium ochoterenae is classified within the family Acanthaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the acanthus or thorny flower family. This plant belongs to the genus Tetramerium, a group of flowering plants primarily found in Central and South America. The species Tetramerium ochoterenae is a type of flowering plant native to Mexico. It is a member of the tribe Justicieae, which is a group of flowering plants known for their distinctive flowers and growth habits. Tetramerium ochoterenae is further classified as a species within the kingdom Plantae.
